name: Sleepora Smart Neck & Shoulder Massager
description:
Relax your body. Sleep better. Feel the difference.

The Sleepora Smart Neck & Shoulder Massager is designed to relieve tension, reduce stress, and give you a deep relaxation experience at home, at work, or anywhere.

Features :

-  Deep kneading massage for neck and shoulders .
-  Multiple intensity levels for personalized comfort .
-  Lightweight and portable design .
-  Easy one-button control .
-  Perfect for daily stress and muscle tension relief .
-  Ideal for office workers, drivers, and anyone with neck pain .

Feel instant comfort and upgrade your nights with Sleepora.
